title: Project Input
description: Strukturerad tolkning av operatörens Init Prompt och konkreta kund-/site-data. Driver vad sajten ska handla om (företagsfakta, ton, tjänster, kontakt). En Project Input är inte en Dossier - en Dossier är en återanvändbar capability, ett Project Input är ett konkret kundprojekt. Filer: examples/<siteId>.project-input.json. Naming-dictionary id: projectInput (canonical 'Project Input', ADR 0012).

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference. Should be relative to this file under governance/schemas/.

siteId.description: Stable id for this Project Input. Matches the filename stem (examples/<siteId>.project-input.json).

scaffoldId.description: Pinned Scaffold id from packages/generation/orchestration/scaffolds/. produce_site_plan honors this as a hard pin in the planning helper.

variantId.description: Pinned Scaffold Variant id. Must be one of the scaffold's variants/<variantId>.json.

language.description: BCP-47-ish language tag (sv, en, en-GB). Used by builder for copy generation.

starterId.description: Optional Starter pin. When present produce_site_plan validates that the starter exists on disk and matches the canonical scaffold->starter mapping (data/starters/README.md scaffold-starter-mapping block).

company.description: Required fields are the ones scripts/build_site.py renders directly into TSX (name + tagline + story + businessType). team / founded are optional - team defaults to [] and the renderers handle that.

location.description: city + serviceAreas are required because the renderers index them directly. country/region are optional metadata.

items.description: summary is required because render_home and render_services render it as a paragraph; an absent summary would crash the builder with KeyError.

requestedCapabilities.description: Capability slugs from governance/policies/capability-map.v1.json. Empty list is valid (no extra capabilities requested).

contact.description: All four fields are required because the contact page (render_contact) renders each one directly into TSX. An absent field would crash the builder with KeyError before Quality Gate runs. Operators that want to ship without a phone/email/address must explicitly pass an empty string or list and then take responsibility for the resulting copy.

selectedDossiers.description: Operator-pinned Dossiers. Object form is canonical post-B18; the legacy plain-list form is still tolerated by produce_site_plan via merge_operator_selected_with_helper.

brand.description: Operator-supplied brand assets. Optional - omit when the operator did not upload anything. build_site.py copy_operator_uploads picks these up and copies the bytes from data/uploads/<siteId>/<assetId>/optimized.webp into the generated site's public/uploads/ before render_layout writes the header/footer. logoText/heroText are optional fallback labels render_layout uses when no logo image is set.

gallery.description: Operator-supplied photo gallery. Each item carries a placement hint that build_site.py renderers consult when placing images on home, about, services, projects, products or a dedicated gallery section. GPT Vision proposes the placement; the operator can override in the wizard.

assetRef.description: Reference to an operator-uploaded image. The bytes live under data/uploads/<siteId>/<assetId>/ (LocalAssetStore today, S3AssetStore tomorrow). filename is what the generated site references as /uploads/<filename>. role and placement drive where the asset is rendered.
